label: The Haggler
description: Loves the piece, hates the price. Pushes for a discount from hello and won't buy without one last fight. Practice holding value — and the line on price — without losing the sale.

label: The Collector
description: Knows artisan work and quietly tests whether you do too. Won't be charmed — only earned. Practice telling the true story behind each piece: maker, technique, origin.

label: The Goldmine
description: Falls for the whole collection and isn't counting pennies. Practice reading the buying signals and growing the sale — the second piece, the bundle — without ever pushing too hard.

label: The Hard Case
description: Cold, blunt, and slow to thaw — nothing impresses her and she lets you know it. Practice keeping your warmth and your footing when the customer gives you nothing back.
